---
title: "KD-GAT Experiment Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: true
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - custom.scss
    nav-buttons: [github]
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// --- Mosaic vgplot + DuckDB-WASM init ---
import { vg, safeLoadParquetTable } from "./_ojs/mosaic-setup.js"
import { renderSpec } from "./_ojs/mosaic-renderer.js"
import { renderTable } from "./_ojs/table-renderer.js"
import { safeEq } from "./_ojs/query-utils.js"

async function loadTable(name, attachment) {
  const url = await attachment.url();
  return safeLoadParquetTable(name, url);
}

// Load all Parquet tables into DuckDB-WASM
tablesReady = {
  await loadTable("metrics", FileAttachment("data/metrics.parquet"));
  await loadTable("runs", FileAttachment("data/runs.parquet"));
  await loadTable("training_curves", FileAttachment("data/training_curves.parquet"));
  await loadTable("recon_errors", FileAttachment("data/recon_errors.parquet"));
  await loadTable("attention_weights", FileAttachment("data/attention_weights.parquet"));
  await loadTable("dqn_policy", FileAttachment("data/dqn_policy.parquet"));
  await loadTable("cka_similarity", FileAttachment("data/cka_similarity.parquet"));
  await loadTable("embeddings", FileAttachment("data/embeddings.parquet"));
  await loadTable("loss_landscape", FileAttachment("data/loss_landscape.parquet"));
  await loadTable("graph_stats", FileAttachment("data/graph_statistics.parquet"));
  await loadTable("model_sizes", FileAttachment("data/model_sizes.parquet"));
  await loadTable("kd_transfer", FileAttachment("data/kd_transfer.parquet"));
  await loadTable("pareto", FileAttachment("data/pareto.parquet"));
  await loadTable("graph_nodes", FileAttachment("data/graph_nodes.parquet"));
  await loadTable("graph_edges", FileAttachment("data/graph_edges.parquet"));
  return true;
}

// --- Pre-computed summary (from export pipeline) ---
summary_stats = FileAttachment("data/summary.json").json()

// --- Static JSON data (for dataset catalog table) ---
datasets_json = FileAttachment("data/datasets.json").json()

// --- Spec base URL ---
specBase = {
  const url = await FileAttachment("figures/fig-f1-by-dataset.yaml").url();
  return url.replace(/fig-f1-by-dataset\.yaml$/, "");
}
```

# Overview

## Row {height=15%}

```{ojs}
//| component: valuebox
//| title: "Total Runs"
//| icon: activity
//| color: primary
summary_stats.total_runs
```

```{ojs}
//| component: valuebox
//| title: "Best F1 Score"
//| icon: award
//| color: success
summary_stats.best_f1 != null
  ? `${summary_stats.best_f1.toFixed(4)} (${summary_stats.best_model})`
  : "N/A"
```

```{ojs}
//| component: valuebox
//| title: "Datasets"
//| icon: database
//| color: info
summary_stats.n_datasets
```

```{ojs}
//| component: valuebox
//| title: "Avg KD Gap (F1)"
//| icon: arrow-down-right
//| color: warning
summary_stats.kd_gap != null ? summary_stats.kd_gap.toFixed(4) : "N/A"
```

## Row {height=45%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Leaderboard"

viewof selectedLeaderboardMetric = Inputs.select(
  ["f1", "accuracy", "precision", "recall", "auc", "mcc"],
  { label: "Metric", value: "f1" }
)

{
  void tablesReady;
  const metric = safeEq(selectedLeaderboardMetric);
  return renderTable(
    `SELECT dataset, model, metric_value AS value
     FROM (UNPIVOT metrics ON (f1, accuracy, precision, recall, auc, mcc)
           INTO NAME metric_name VALUE metric_value)
     WHERE metric_name = '${metric}' AND metric_value IS NOT NULL
     ORDER BY metric_value DESC`,
    {
      columns: ["dataset", "model", "value"],
      header: { dataset: "Dataset", model: "Model", value: selectedLeaderboardMetric.toUpperCase() },
      format: { value: d => d?.toFixed(4) },
      width: { dataset: 120, model: 80, value: 100 },
    }
  );
}
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Dataset Comparison"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-dataset-comparison.yaml"); }
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "F1 Scores by Dataset and Model"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-f1-by-dataset.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Model Parameter Counts"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-model-params.yaml"); }
```

# Performance

## Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Bubble Chart: F1 vs Accuracy (size = parameters)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-bubble-f1-accuracy.yaml"); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Pareto Frontier: F1 vs Parameter Count"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-pareto-frontier.yaml"); }
```

## Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "F1 vs AUC by Model"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-f1-vs-auc.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Runs by Dataset"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-runs-stacked.yaml"); }
```

# Training

## Row {height=35%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Training Duration by Run"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-training-duration.yaml"); }
```

## Row {height=35%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Training Curve Comparison"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-training-comparison.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Training Carpet (Metric x Epoch Heatmap)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-training-carpet.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

# GAT & DQN

## Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "GAT Attention Weights by Layer"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-attention-heatmap.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "DQN Fusion Policy (Alpha Distribution)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-dqn-policy.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

## Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Training Curves (single run)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-training-curves-single.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "VGAE Reconstruction Errors"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-recon-errors.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

# Knowledge Distillation

## Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "KD Transfer: Teacher vs Student"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-kd-transfer.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "CKA Similarity (Teacher-Student Layer Alignment)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-cka-heatmap.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

## Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "UMAP Embeddings (VGAE)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-umap-vgae.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "UMAP Embeddings (GAT)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-umap-gat.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

# Loss Landscape

## Row {height=60%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "2D Loss Landscape Contour"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-loss-landscape-2d.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Loss Profile (1D Slice Through Minimum)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-loss-profile-1d.yaml"); }
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Loss Landscape Summary Statistics"
{
  void tablesReady;
  return renderTable(
    vg.sql`
      SELECT
        model_type AS model, dataset,
        MIN(loss) AS min_loss, MAX(loss) AS max_loss,
        AVG(loss) AS avg_loss, STDDEV(loss) AS std_loss,
        COUNT(*) AS grid_points
      FROM loss_landscape
      GROUP BY model_type, dataset
      ORDER BY model_type, dataset
    `,
    {
      columns: ["model", "dataset", "min_loss", "max_loss", "avg_loss", "std_loss", "grid_points"],
      format: {
        min_loss: d => d?.toFixed(4), max_loss: d => d?.toFixed(4),
        avg_loss: d => d?.toFixed(4), std_loss: d => d?.toFixed(4),
      },
      header: {
        model: "Model", dataset: "Dataset", min_loss: "Min Loss",
        max_loss: "Max Loss", avg_loss: "Avg Loss", std_loss: "Std Loss",
        grid_points: "Grid Points",
      },
    }
  );
}
```

# Graph Structure {.tabset}

## Network

### Row

```{ojs}
//| title: "CAN Bus Graph Structure (Pre-computed Layout)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-graph-network.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

## Graph Analysis

### Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Degree Distribution: Normal vs Attack"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-degree-distribution.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

### Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Feature Comparison by Attack Type"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-feature-heatmap.yaml"); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Adjacency Pattern by Dataset"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-adjacency-matrix.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

## Statistics

### Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Graph Statistics by Attack Type"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-graph-stats-boxplot.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Clustering Coefficient by Attack Type"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-clustering-coeff.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

### Row {height=50%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Summary Statistics by Attack Type"
{
  void tablesReady;
  return renderTable(
    vg.sql`
      SELECT
        attack_type_name,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        ROUND(AVG(density), 4) AS mean_density,
        ROUND(STDDEV(density), 4) AS std_density,
        ROUND(AVG(avg_degree), 2) AS mean_degree,
        ROUND(AVG(clustering_coeff), 4) AS mean_clustering,
        ROUND(AVG(num_components), 2) AS mean_components,
        ROUND(AVG(betweenness_centrality_max), 4) AS mean_bc_max
      FROM graph_stats
      GROUP BY attack_type_name
      ORDER BY attack_type_name
    `,
    {
      columns: ["attack_type_name", "n", "mean_density", "std_density", "mean_degree", "mean_clustering", "mean_components", "mean_bc_max"],
      header: {
        attack_type_name: "Attack Type", n: "Count",
        mean_density: "Density (u)", std_density: "Density (s)",
        mean_degree: "Degree (u)", mean_clustering: "Clustering (u)",
        mean_components: "Components (u)", mean_bc_max: "BC Max (u)",
      },
    }
  );
}
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Graph Feature Overview"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-graph-parallel.yaml", { skipDataLoad: true }); }
```

# Datasets

## Row

```{ojs}
//| title: "Dataset Catalog"
{
  const data = datasets_json.data;
  return Inputs.table(data, {
    columns: ["name", "domain", "protocol", "source", "description"],
    header: {
      name: "Dataset", domain: "Domain", protocol: "Protocol",
      source: "Source", description: "Description"
    },
    width: { name: 100, domain: 100, protocol: 80, source: 120, description: 300 }
  });
}
```

# Staging

## Row {height=40%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Run Timeline"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-run-timeline.yaml"); }
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Model Predictions Summary"

viewof predRun = {
  void tablesReady;
  const result = await vg.coordinator().query(
    vg.sql`SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM metrics ORDER BY run_id`
  );
  const runs = Array.from(result, d => d.run_id);
  return Inputs.select(runs, { label: "Run", value: runs[0] });
}

{
  const escaped = safeEq(predRun);
  return renderTable(
    `SELECT model, f1, accuracy, precision, recall, auc, mcc, n_samples
     FROM metrics WHERE run_id = '${escaped}'`,
    {
      columns: ["model", "f1", "accuracy", "precision", "recall", "auc", "mcc", "n_samples"],
      format: {
        f1: d => d?.toFixed(4), accuracy: d => d?.toFixed(4),
        precision: d => d?.toFixed(4), recall: d => d?.toFixed(4),
        auc: d => d?.toFixed(4), mcc: d => d?.toFixed(4),
      },
      header: {
        model: "Model", f1: "F1", accuracy: "Accuracy",
        precision: "Precision", recall: "Recall", auc: "AUC",
        mcc: "MCC", n_samples: "Samples",
      },
    }
  );
}
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Confusion Matrix Proxy (FPR vs FNR)"
{ void tablesReady; return renderSpec(specBase + "fig-confusion-proxy.yaml"); }
```
